menu_option_descriptions.scan: Search miners in the local subnet
menu_option_descriptions.manual: Connect directly to a miner by IP address
menu_option_descriptions.farm: One device with totals and emergency stop for linked miners

farm.title: Farm
farm.description: Choose miner devices already in Home Assistant. Set a power switch per miner in Configure for emergency stop.

error.invalid_subnet: Invalid subnet. Use IPv4 CIDR like 192.168.1.0/24
error.farm_no_title: Enter a name for the farm
error.farm_no_devices: Select at least one miner device
error.farm_invalid_device: A selected device no longer exists
error.farm_only_miner_devices: Only individual miner devices can be added (not another farm)

abort.farm_no_options: Farm has no options screen; delete and add the farm again to change miners.

init.title: Miner options
init.description: Smart plug switch and optional stratum pool changes (miner must be reachable to apply pools).

pool_action.name: Stratum pool
pool_action.description: Leave as-is, replace the primary slot, or add a backup (up to 3 pools).

options.replace_primary: Set primary pool (host and port below)
options.append_backup: Add backup pool (host and port below)

error.invalid_switch: The selected entity is missing or is not a switch
error.pool_fields_required: Enter both stratum host and port for this action.
error.pool_apply_failed: The miner rejected the pool change or the backup pool limit was reached.
error.miner_offline: Cannot reach the miner; pool was not changed.
error.miner_not_loaded: Miner integration is not loaded; try again later.

restart_backend.name: Restart mining on miner
restart_backend.description: Restarts the mining process on a miner.

set_work_mode.name: Set work mode on miner
set_work_mode.description: Sets the work mode (low, normal, high) on a miner.

set_pool.name: Set pool on miner
set_pool.description: Reorder configured pools, replace the primary stratum URL, or append a backup (mode append, max 3 pools).
